title: Release Plan (v2 — widened manifest)
description: Phase 1.8 widened release plan. Replaces the 1.0 schema's journey-only trace surface with a full manifest: every accepted handoff artifact (journeys, workflows, entities, compliance items, integrations, vocabulary terms) is assigned to exactly one release's `contains[type]` array OR to the top-level `cross_cutting` bucket for artifacts that legitimately span all releases. Eliminates the silent-null release-assignment failure mode in Phase 2 `assignReleaseToRoot` for FRs whose traces_to points at non-journey artifacts. Gated by the human via MMP after a deterministic Phase 1.8 coverage-and-coherence verifier passes. Once approved, Phase 2 assigns each FR / NFR root to a release by looking up any trace id against the manifest; descendants inherit release_id through parent_node_id.

approved.description: True once the human gate accepts the plan. Only approved plans drive downstream Phase 2 assignment.

approval_note.description: Free-text note from the human at approval time.

CrossCuttingContents.description: Artifacts that span all releases by design. Journeys and entities intentionally absent — see ReleasePlanContentV2 docstring in records.ts.
